diagrams.title: Cortex-M Vector Table Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the organization of vector table entries from index 0 to N, including system exceptions and external interrupts
elements: Index 17+: External IRQs (UART, Timer, SPI, etc.)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding vector table layout and entry positions for different exception types

diagrams.title: Exception Entry Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the step-by-step flow from exception occurrence to handler execution
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the complete exception handling sequence in Cortex-M

diagrams.title: Vector Table Relocation using VTOR
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how VTOR register allows moving vector table from default FLASH to alternative location
elements: New location: RAM address or alternative FLASH
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how to dynamically relocate vector table for bootloaders and runtime flexibility
